messages.content: Write me a poem about Faith!

is not sight that holds the key
To unlock deepest mystery,
But rather, walking through the night
With only intuition’s light.

It is the anchor in the tide
When stormy waters swell and chide,
A steady grip on stones unseen
That keeps the spirit sharp and keen.

It is the seed beneath the snow,
That trusts the warmth it does not know,
Believing in the spring’s return
Before the seasons discern.

To walk a path that isn’t clear,
To silence doubt and conquer fear,
To build a bridge across the void
Where strength and hope are not destroyed.

So when the world asks for your proof,
Look past the sky’s most distant roof;
For faith is not a thing to see,
But knowing what is meant
